form.formComment: Finished up last campaign with a win at Lyon-la-Soie, but hasn't been as effective this campaign with a first-up effort 9th (50m) over 2000m at Lyon-la-Soie beaten 52m by Manzana in 4yo race on March 9 at $10. Then last outing 7th over 2550m at this track beaten 45m by Me And You in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 14 at $33. Would like to see him return to winning form before backing.

Then last outing 7th over 2550m at this track beaten 45m by Me And You in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 14 at $33. Would like to see him return to winning form before backing.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche, beaten 34m by Meydan Voirons in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 30 at $182. Before that 5th over 2550m at this track beaten 9m by Me And You in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 14 at $18. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Resumed after a 123-day break disqualified at Chatelaillon La Rochelle on March 29 over 2625m. Struggling but is well-placed and is a definite each-way chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after six months off the scene. Finished off last preparation when beaten by 3.9m finishing second behind Milton Du Chatelet at Cabourg over 2750m in a 3yo colts and gelding race on October 23 at $4.90. Can build on that recent effort.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th over 2100m at Vincennes, beaten 32m by Milan in 4yo claiming R on April 3 at $83. Before that disqualified at Mauquenchy on March 16 over 2150m. Others look better placed.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Nancy and Vire. Last start won by 3.9m at Nancy beating Mona Vili in 4yo handicap on March 28 at $16. Going very well and deserves top billing.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fifth behind Meydan Voirons at Le Croisé-Laroche over 2700m in a 4yo colts and gelding race on March 30 at $40. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 2nd over 2500m at this track, beaten 15m by Mojito Cene in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 19 at $2.80. Chief contender.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he game effort when 2nd over 2800m at Cholet, beaten 7.7m by Matador in 3yo race on May 13 at $8. A strong chance while fresh.

form.formComment: Last start disqualified at this track on March 14 over 2550m. Two runs back 4th over 2550m at this track, beaten 13m by Maybe Dairpet in 3yo race on October 19 at $25. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Resuming after a layoff of six-and-a-half months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation when thirteenth at very long odds behind Midnight Sun. Looks to be making up the numbers.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 2.6m at Amiens beating Mucho Bello in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 15. Two runs back posted a big 19m win as favourite at Amiens beating Mec D'erlanger in 4yo colts and gelding race on February 21 at $2.10. Rates highly. Big chance.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 8th over 2750m at Cabourg beaten 14m by Mister Parker in 3yo colts and gelding race on August 26 at $54. Prefer him later in the campaign.
